tests.scenario: Open support chat from the home screen
steps: Launch the app and wait for the home screen
Tap the primary support action once
tests.expected_result: A chat session opens and accepts text input within 3 seconds.

tests.scenario: Do not require extra navigation before chat starts
steps: Launch the app to the home screen
Count the number of taps required to reach an active chat input
tests.expected_result: The user reaches an active chat input in no more than one tap.

steps: Open a support chat
Send the message 'I feel overwhelmed and anxious today'
tests.expected_result: The first system response acknowledges the user's emotional state and does not contain blaming or dismissive wording.

steps: Open a support chat
Send the message 'I feel alone and do not know who to talk to'
tests.expected_result: The first system response references loneliness or support and remains non-judgmental.

steps: Open the self-help tools area
tests.expected_result: The interface shows breathing, journaling, and thought reframing as distinct exercise categories.

steps: Open the self-help tools area
Refresh or reopen the tools area
tests.expected_result: Breathing, journaling, and thought reframing remain available as separate categories.

steps: Open the self-help tools area
Select the breathing category
Start a listed breathing exercise
tests.expected_result: The chosen exercise starts within 2 taps from the tools area and shows its first instruction within 3 seconds.

steps: Open the self-help tools area
Select a listed journaling exercise
tests.expected_result: The journaling exercise starts within 2 taps from the tools area and shows the first prompt within 3 seconds.

steps: Open a support chat
Send the message 'I am nervous about tomorrow's exam and cannot sleep'
tests.expected_result: The reply references nervousness, the exam, sleep difficulty, or a combination of those topics.

steps: Open a support chat
Send the message 'I argued with my friend and feel guilty'
tests.expected_result: The reply references the conflict, guilt, or the friendship situation described by the user.

steps: Open a support chat
Exchange at least 6 back-and-forth turns about work stress
Ask a follow-up question about the same stressor
tests.expected_result: The system response reflects details from the earlier messages in the same session.

tests.scenario: Do not restart the chat after a follow-up
steps: Open a support chat
Describe a specific personal concern
Send a follow-up question in the same session
tests.expected_result: The system continues the same conversation instead of resetting to a generic introduction.

tests.scenario: Label free and paid sections on the pricing screen
steps: Open the pricing or upgrade screen
tests.expected_result: The screen contains one labeled free section and one labeled paid section before purchase confirmation.

steps: Open the pricing or upgrade screen
Review the content before selecting purchase
tests.expected_result: Feature availability is separated into free and paid sections before the user reaches checkout.

tests.scenario: Dismiss an upgrade prompt in a free-tier flow
steps: Open a feature marked as free-tier
Wait for an upgrade prompt if it appears
Select the dismiss action
tests.expected_result: The user returns to the same free-tier flow without losing progress.

tests.scenario: Keep draft state after dismissing an upgrade prompt
steps: Enter text in a free-tier conversation flow
Dismiss an upgrade prompt
tests.expected_result: The user remains in the free-tier flow and previously entered text is still present.

tests.scenario: Load the home screen within the target time
steps: Launch the app on a supported device with normal network connectivity
Measure the time until the home screen becomes interactive
tests.expected_result: The home screen becomes interactive within 3 seconds.

tests.scenario: Load an active chat screen within the target time
steps: Open an existing chat session on a supported device with normal network connectivity
Measure the time until the chat screen becomes interactive
tests.expected_result: The active chat screen becomes interactive within 3 seconds.

tests.scenario: Restore an unsent draft after interruption
steps: Type a draft message in an active chat without sending it
Send the app to the background or close it unexpectedly
Reopen the app on the same day
tests.expected_result: The unsent draft text is restored.

steps: Complete a multi-turn conversation in an active chat
Close the app unexpectedly or send it to the background
Reopen the app on the same day
tests.expected_result: The previously completed chat messages are restored.
